translations.text: Allah has prepared for them a severe punishment; surely what they do is evil.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: God has prepared a severe punishment for them; surely what they have done is evil.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Allah has prepared for them a severe Penalty: evil indeed are their deeds.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: aAAadda Allahu lahum AAathaban shadeedan innahum saa ma kanoo yaAAmaloona

16.arabic: ٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ أَيْمَـٰنَهُمْ جُنَّةً فَصَدُّوا۟ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ مُّهِينٌ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: They have made their oaths a shield, and obstruct people from the way of God. There is shameful punishment for them.

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: They use their oaths as a shield therefore preventing from Allah’s way – so for them is a disgraceful punishment.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: They have taken their oaths as a covering, and barred from God's way; so there awaits them a humbling chastisement.

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: They have taken their oaths as a shield, and they have hindered others from the way of Allah; wherefore theirs shall be a torment ignominious.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: They have made their oaths a screen (for their evil actions). Thus they hinder (men) from the Path of Allah, so they shall have a humiliating torment.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: They took their oaths as a screen, and prevented others from God’s path. They will have a shameful punishment.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: They have taken their oaths as a shield by means of which they hinder people from the Way of Allah. Theirs shall be a humiliating chastisement.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: They have made their oaths a screen. Thus they hinder (others) from the path of Allah, so they shall have a humiliating torment.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: They make a shelter of their oaths and turn (men) from the way of Allah; so theirs will be a shameful doom.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: They make a shield of their oaths and bar [people] from the way of Allah; so there is a humiliating punishment for them.

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: They have taken their oaths as a disguise and bar from the Way of Allah, so a humiliating punishment awaits them.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: They took their [false] oaths as a cover, so they averted [people] from the way of Allah, and for them is a humiliating punishment.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: They have made their oaths as a shield to obstruct others from the way of God. They will suffer a humiliating torment.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: They make their oaths to serve as a cover so they turn away from Allah's way; therefore they shall have an abasing chastisement.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: They have used their oaths to cover up their misdeeds and have thus turned others away from the path of God. A humiliating punishment awaits them.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: They have made their oaths a screen (for their misdeeds): thus they obstruct (men) from the Path of Allah: therefore shall they have a humiliating Penalty.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Ittakhathoo aymanahum junnatan fasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi falahum AAathabun muheenun

17.arabic: لَّن تُغْنِىَ عَنْهُمْ أَمْوَٰلُهُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ ۖ هُمْ فِيهَا خَـٰلِدُونَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: Neither their wealth nor children will avail them against God. They are the people of Hell, and there will abide for ever.

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Their wealth and their children will be of no use to them before Allah; they are the people of hell; they are to remain in it forever.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: Neither their riches nor their children shall avail them anything against God; those -- they are the inhabitants of the Fire, therein dwelling forever.

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: There will not avail them against Allah their riches or their children at all. Th are the fellows of the Fire; therein they will be abiders.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: Their children and their wealth will avail them nothing against Allah. They will be (the) dwellers of the Fire, to dwell therein forever.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Neither their possessions nor their children will avail them anything against God. These are the inhabitants of the Fire, dwelling therein forever.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: Neither their possessions nor their offspring will be of any avail to them against Allah. They are the people of the Fire; therein they shall abide.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: Their children and their wealth will avail them nothing against Allah. They will be the dwellers of the Fire to dwell therein forever.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Their wealth and their children will avail them naught against Allah. Such are rightful owners of the Fire; they will abide therein.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: Their possessions and children will not avail them in any way against Allah. They shall be the inmates of the Fire and they shall remain in it [forever].

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Neither their wealth nor their children shall help them a thing against Allah. They are the inhabitants of the Fire, and there they shall live for ever.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Never will their wealth or their children avail them against Allah at all. Those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: Neither their wealth nor their children will be able to protect them against God. They will be the dwellers of hell fire wherein they will live forever.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Neither their wealth nor their children shall avail them aught against Allah; they are the inmates of the fire, therein they shall abide.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: Neither their wealth nor their children will be of the least avail [in protecting them] against God -- they are the inheritors of Hell, and there they shall remain forever.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Of no profit whatever to them, against Allah, will be their riches nor their sons: they will be Companions of the Fire, to dwell therein (for aye)!

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Lan tughniya AAanhum amwaluhum wala awladuhum mina Allahi shayan olaika ashabu alnnari hum feeha khalidoona

18.arabic: يَوْمَ يَبْعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعًا فَيَحْلِفُونَ لَهُۥ كَمَا يَحْلِفُونَ لَكُمْ ۖ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْكَـٰذِبُونَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: On the day that God will raise them together, they will swear before Him as they swear before you, and imagine they are on the right path. Is it not they who are liars?

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: The day when Allah will raise them all, they will swear in His presence the way they now swear in front of you, and they will assume that they have achieved something; pay heed! Indeed it is they who are the liars.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: Upon the day when God shall raise them up all together, and they will swear to Him, as they swear to you, and think they are on something. Surely, they are the liars!

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: This shall befall on a Day whereon Allah shall raise them all together; then they will swear Unto Him even as they swear Unto you, deeming themselves up on aught. Lo! verily they! they are the liars.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: On the Day when Allah will resurrect them all together (for their account), then they will swear to Him as they swear to you (O Muslims). And they think that they have something (to stand upon). Verily, they are liars!

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: On the Day when God will resurrect them altogether—they will swear to Him, as they swear to you, thinking that they are upon something. Indeed, they themselves are the liars.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: On the Day when Allah will raise them all from the dead they will swear before Him as they swear before you today, thinking that this will avail them. Behold, they are utter liars.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: On the Day when Allah will resurrect them all together; then they will swear to Him as they swear to you. And they think that they have something. Verily, they are liars!

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: On the day when Allah will raise them all together, then will they swear unto Him as they (now) swear unto you, and they will fancy that they have some standing. Lo! is it not they who are the liars?

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: The day when Allah will raise them all together, they will swear to Him, just like they swear to you [now], supposing that they stand on something. Look! They are indeed liars!

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: On the Day when Allah shall raise them all up, they will swear to Him as they now swear to you thinking that they are upon something. Indeed, they are the liars!

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: On the Day Allah will resurrect them all, and they will swear to Him as they swear to you and think that they are [standing] on something. Unquestionably, it is they who are the liars.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: On the day when God will resurrect them all together, they will swear to Him as they swore to you and they will think that they have a good case but they are certainly liars.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: On the day that Allah will raise them up all, then they will swear to Him as they swear to you, and they think that they have something; now surely they are the liars.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: On the day God raises them all up from the dead, they will swear to Him just as they have sworn to you, thinking that they are on firm ground. But surely they are liars.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: One day will Allah raise them all up (for Judgment): then will they swear to Him as they swear to you: And they think that they have something (to stand upon). No, indeed! they are but liars!

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Yawma yabAAathuhumu Allahu jameeAAan fayahlifoona lahu kama yahlifoona lakum wayahsaboona annahum AAala shayin ala innahum humu alkathiboona

19.arabic: ٱسْتَحْوَذَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ ذِكْرَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: Satan has got the better of them. and made them forget to remember God. Indeed they belong to Satan's faction. Will not Satan's faction perish?

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: The devil has overpowered them, so they forgot the remembrance of Allah; they are the devil’s group; pay heed! Indeed it is the devil’s group who are the losers.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: Satan has gained the mastery over them, and caused them to forget God's Remembrance. Those are Satan's party; why, Satan's party, surely, they are the losers!

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: The Satan hath overpowered them, and so hath caused them to forget the remembrance of Allah. These are the band of the Satan. Lo! verily it is the Satan's band that shall be the losers.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: Shaitan (Satan) has overtaken them. So he has made them forget the remembrance of Allah. They are the party of Shaitan (Satan). Verily, it is the party of Shaitan (Satan) that will be the losers!

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Satan has taken hold of them, and so has caused them to forget the remembrance of God. These are the partisans of Satan. Indeed, it is Satan’s partisans who are the losers.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: Satan has gained mastery over them and has made them neglect remembering Allah. They are the party of Satan. Behold, the party of Satan will be the losers.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: The Shaytan has overpowered them. So he has made them forget the remembrance of Allah. They are the party of Shaytan. Verily, it is the party of Shaytan that will be the losers!.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: The devil hath engrossed them and so hath caused them to forget remembrance of Allah. They are the devil's party. Lo! is it not the devil's party who will be the losers?

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: Satan has prevailed upon them, so he has caused them to forget the remembrance of Allah. They are Satan’s confederates. Look! Indeed, it is Satan’s confederates who are the losers!

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: satan has mastered them and caused them to forget the Remembrance of Allah. Those are satan's party; and satan's party shall assuredly be the losers.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Satan has overcome them and made them forget the remembrance of Allah. Those are the party of Satan. Unquestionably, the party of Satan - they will be the losers.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: Satan has dominated them and has made them forget the guidance of God. They are Satan's party and the party of Satan will certainly suffer a great loss.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: The Shaitan has gained the mastery over them, so he has made them forget the remembrance of Allah; they are the Shaitan's party; now surely the Shaitan's party are the losers.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: Satan has got the better of them and has caused them to forget the remembrance of God. They have gone over to the side of the devil, and it is as the devil's partisans that they shall be the losers:

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: The Evil One has got the better of them: so he has made them lose the remembrance of Allah. They are the Party of the Evil One. Truly, it is the Party of the Evil One that will perish!

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Istahwatha AAalayhimu alshshaytanu faansahum thikra Allahi olaika hizbu alshshaytani ala inna hizba alshshaytani humu alkhasiroona

20.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى ٱلْأَذَلِّينَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: Surely those who oppose God and His Prophet will be among the vilest.

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Indeed those who oppose Allah and His Noble Messenger, are among the most despicable.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: Surely those who oppose God and His Messenger, those are among the most abject.

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Verily those; who oppose Allah and His apostle - they are among the lowest.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: Those who oppose Allah and His Messenger (Muhammad SAW), they will be among the lowest (most humiliated).

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Those who oppose God and His Messenger are among the lowliest.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: Verily those who oppose Allah and His Messenger will be among the most abject beings.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: Those who oppose Allah and His Messenger, they will be among those most humiliated.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Lo! those who oppose Allah and His messenger, they will be among the lowest.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: Indeed those who oppose Allah and His Apostle—they will be among the most abased.

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Those who oppose Allah and His Messenger shall be among the humiliated.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Indeed, the ones who oppose Allah and His Messenger - those will be among the most humbled.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: Disgrace will strike those who oppose God and His Messenger.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Surely (as for) those who are in opposition to Allah and His Apostle; they shall be among the most abased.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: those who oppose God and His Messenger will [on Judgement Day] be among the most abased.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Those who resist Allah and His Messenger will be among those most humiliated.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Inna allatheena yuhaddoona Allaha warasoolahu olaika fee alathalleena

21.arabic: كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَغْلِبَنَّ أَنَا۠ وَرُسُلِىٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: God has decreed: "I will prevail, I and My apostles." Verily God is powerful and all-mighty.

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Allah has already decreed that, “I will indeed be victorious, and My Noble Messengers”; indeed Allah is Almighty, the Most Honourable.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: God has written, 'I shall assuredly be the victor, I and My Messengers.' Surely God is All-strong, All-mighty.

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Allah hath prescribed: surely shall overcome, and My apostles. Verily Allah is strong, Mighty.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: Allah has decreed: "Verily! It is I and My Messengers who shall be the victorious." Verily, Allah is All-Powerful, All-Mighty.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: God has written: “I will certainly prevail, I and My messengers.” God is Strong and Mighty.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: Allah has written: “Surely I will prevail; I and My Messengers.” Verily Allah is Most Strong, Most Mighty.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: Allah has decreed: "Verily, I and My Messengers shall be the victorious." Verily, Allah is All-Powerful, Almighty.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Allah hath decreed: Lo! I verily shall conquer, I and My messengers. Lo! Allah is Strong, Almighty.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: Allah has ordained: ‘I shall surely prevail, I and My apostles.’ Indeed Allah is all-strong, all-mighty.

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Allah has written: 'I will surely be the Victor, I and My Messengers' Surely, Allah is the Strong, the Almighty.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Allah has written, "I will surely overcome, I and My messengers." Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: God has decreed, "I and My Messenger shall certainly triumph." God is All-powerful and Majestic.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Allah has written down: I will most certainly prevail, I and My apostles; surely Allah is Strong, Mighty.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: God has decreed, "I and My messengers shall most certainly prevail." Truly God is Powerful and Almighty.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Allah has decreed: "It is I and My messengers who must prevail": For Allah is One full of strength, able to enforce His Will.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Kataba Allahu laaghlibanna ana warusulee inna Allaha qawiyyun AAazeezun

22.arabic: لَّا تَجِدُ قَوْمًا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِ يُوَآدُّونَ مَنْ حَآدَّ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَلَوْ كَانُوٓا۟ ءَابَآءَهُمْ أَوْ أَبْنَآءَهُمْ أَوْ إِخْوَٰنَهُمْ أَوْ عَشِيرَتَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ كَتَبَ فِى قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلْإِيمَـٰنَ وَأَيَّدَهُم بِرُوحٍ مِّنْهُ ۖ وَيُدْخِلُهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ رَضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱللَّهِ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: You will not find those who believe in God and the Day of Resurrection, loving those who oppose God and His Prophet, even though they be their fathers, sons, or brothers or their kin. God has inscribed on their hearts belief, and has succoured them with His own grace, and will admit them to gardens with rivers flowing by, where they will abide for ever, God accepting them, and they, happy in the pleasure of God. They are verily the army of God. Will not the army of God be victorious?

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: You will not find the people who believe in Allah and the Last Day, befriending those who oppose Allah and His Noble Messenger, even if they are their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their tribesmen; it is these upon whose hearts Allah has ingrained faith, and has aided them with a Spirit from Himself; and He will admit them into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding in them forever; Allah is pleased with them, and they are pleased with Him; this is Allah’s group; pay heed! Indeed it is Allah’s group who are the successful.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: Thou shalt not find any people who believe in God and the Last Day who are loving to anyone who opposes. God and His Messenger, not though they were their fathers, or their sons, or their brothers, or their clan. Those -- He has written faith upon their hearts, and He has confirmed them with a Spirit from Himself; and He shall admit them into gardens underneath which rivers flow, therein to dwell forever, God being well-pleased with them, and they well-pleased with Him. Those are God's party; why, surely God's party -- they are the prosperers.

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Thou shalt not find a people who believe in Allah and the Last Day befriending those who oppose Allah and His apostle, even though they be their fathers or their sons or their brethren or their kindred. These! He hath inscribed faith on their hearts and hath strengthened them with a spirit from Him: and He shall make them enter Gardens whereunder rivers flow as abiders therein. Allah is well pleased with them, and they are well pleased with Him. These are Allah's band. Lo! verily it is the Allah's band that are the blissful.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: You (O Muhammad SAW) will not find any people who believe in Allah and the Last Day, making friendship with those who oppose Allah and His Messenger (Muhammad SAW), even though they were their fathers, or their sons, or their brothers, or their kindred (people). For such He has written Faith in their hearts, and strengthened them with Ruh (proofs, light and true guidance) from Himself. And We will admit them to Gardens (Paradise) under which rivers flow, to dwell therein (forever). Allah is pleased with them, and they with Him. They are the Party of Allah. Verily, it is the Party of Allah that will be the successful.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: You will not find a people who believe in God and the Last Day, loving those who oppose God and His Messenger, even if they were their parents, or their children, or their siblings, or their close relatives. These—He has inscribed faith in their hearts, and has supported them with a spirit from Him. And He will admit them into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will dwell forever. God is pleased with them, and they are pleased with Him. These are the partisans of God. Indeed, it is God’s partisans who are the successful.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: You shall not find a people who believe in Allah and the Last Day befriending those who oppose Allah and His Messenger even though they be their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their kindred. He has inscribed faith in their hearts and has strengthened them with a spirit from Him, and He shall make them enter Gardens beneath which rivers flow. Therein they shall abide. Allah is well-pleased with them, and they are well-pleased with Him. They belong to Allah's party. Verily Allah's party shall prosper.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: You will not find any people who believe in Allah and the Last Day, making friendship with those who oppose Allah and His Messenger, even though they were their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their kindred. For such He has written faith in their hearts, and strengthened them with Ruh from Himself. And He will admit them to Gardens under which rivers flow, to dwell therein (forever). Allah is well pleased with them, and they are well pleased with Him. They are the party of Allah. Verily, the party of Allah will be the successful.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Thou wilt not find folk who believe in Allah and the Last Day loving those who oppose Allah and His messenger, even though they be their fathers or their sons or their brethren or their clan. As for such, He hath written faith upon their hearts and hath strengthened them with a Spirit from Him, and He will bring them into Gardens underneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide. Allah is well pleased with them, and they are well pleased with Him. They are Allah's party. Lo! is it not Allah's party who are the successful?

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: You will not find a people believing in Allah and the Last Day endearing those who oppose Allah and His Apostle even though they were their own parents, or children, or brothers, or kinsfolk. [For] such, He has written faith into their hearts and strengthened them with a spirit from Him. He will admit them into gardens with streams running in them, to remain in them [forever], Allah is pleased with them, and they are pleased with Him. They are Allah’s confederates. Look! The confederates of Allah are indeed felicitous!

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: You shall find no nation believing in Allah and the Last Day loving anyone that opposes Allah and His Messenger, even though they be their fathers, theirsons, their brothers, or their tribe. Those, He has written upon their hearts faith and strengthened them with a spirit from Him. He will admit them to the Gardensunderneath which rivers flow, where they shall live for ever. Allah is pleased with them and they are pleased with Him. They are the Party of Allah; and the Party ofAllah are the winners.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: You will not find a people who believe in Allah and the Last Day having affection for those who oppose Allah and His Messenger, even if they were their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their kindred. Those - He has decreed within their hearts faith and supported them with spirit from Him. And We will admit them to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. Allah is pleased with them, and they are pleased with Him - those are the party of Allah. Unquestionably, the party of Allah - they are the successful.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: You will not find any people of faith in God and the Day of Judgment who would establish friendship with those who oppose God and His Messenger, even if it would be in the interest of their fathers, sons, brothers, and kinsmen. God has established faith in their hearts and supported them by a Spirit from Himself. He will admit them to Paradise wherein streams flow to live therein forever. God is pleased with them and they are pleased with God. These are members of the party of God and the party of God will certainly have everlasting happiness.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: You shall not find a people who believe in Allah and the latter day befriending those who act in opposition to Allah and His Apostle, even though they were their (own) fathers, or their sons, or their brothers, or their kinsfolk; these are they into whose hearts He has impressed faith, and whom He has strengthened with an inspiration from Him: and He will cause them to enter gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein; Allah is well-pleased with them and they are well-pleased with Him these are Allah's party: now surely the party of Allah are the successful ones.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: You will find no believers in God and the Last Day consorting with those who oppose God and His Messenger, even though they be their fathers, their sons, their brothers or their close relatives. He has engraved faith on their very hearts and has strengthened them with a spirit of His own. He will usher them into Gardens through which rivers flow where they shall dwell forever. God is well-pleased with them and they are well pleased with Him. They are God's party. God's party shall surely enter into a state of bliss.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Thou wilt not find any people who believe in Allah and the Last Day, loving those who resist Allah and His Messenger, even though they were their fathers or their sons, or their brothers, or their kindred. For such He has written Faith in their hearts, and strengthened them with a spirit from Himself. And He will admit them to Gardens beneath which Rivers flow, to dwell therein (for ever). Allah will be well pleased with them, and they with Him. They are the Party of Allah. Truly it is the Party of Allah that will achieve Felicity.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: La tajidu qawman yuminoona biAllahi waalyawmi alakhiri yuwaddoona man hadda Allaha warasoolahu walaw kanoo abaahum aw abnaahum aw ikhwanahum aw AAasheeratahum olaika kataba fee quloobihimu aleemana waayyadahum biroohin minhu wayudkhiluhum jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha radiya Allahu AAanhum waradoo AAanhu olaika hizbu Allahi ala inna hizba Allahi humu almuflihoona
